creator: olivierd@FreeBSD.org
text:
If update of textproc/libcue to 2.1.0 is fine for you, I can commit it (or 2.0.1).

Now sysutils/tracker build successfully with the new 2.0 API.

All ports (audio/mous, sysutils/tracker, and multimedia/audacious-plugins) which depend of textproc/libcue build fine with 2.0.1 and 2.1.0.
